---
title: "Molecules of industrial interest"
---

##Molecules of Industrial Interest

[![Ammonia is used in the production of fertilizers.](amoníaco.png){width="40%"}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=N)

<p style="text-align:right;">
[Wikipedia](https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ammonia)
</p>

[![Methanol is used as a solvent and in the production of formaldehyde.](Metanol.png){width="40%"}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=CO)

<p style="text-align:right;">
[Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Methanol)
</p>

[![Polyethylene is the most common plastic in the world.](polietileno.png){width="40%"}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=%20C=C)

<p style="text-align:right;">
[Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Polyethylene)
</p>

[![Vinyl chloride is used in the production of PVC.](cloreto%20de%20vinila.png){width="40%"}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=C=CCl)

<p style="text-align:right;">
[Wikipedia](https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cloreto_de_vinila)
</p>
